LanguageData.FCP_StrapToPowerLineDesc: Select a prisoner to strap to this power line.
LanguageData.FCP_RemoveFromPowerLineDesc: Order a colonist to remove this person from the power line.
LanguageData.FCP_SelectColonistToRemove: A colonist will be sent to remove the prisoner from the power line.
LanguageData.FCP_PawnStrapped: {0} has been strapped to the power line.
LanguageData.FCP_PawnRemovedFromPowerLine: {0} has been removed from the power line.
